description.zh: StyleGAN 围绕学习得到的风格空间重新设计 GAN 生成器，用风格调制合成层。该架构生成了高质量人脸，也让潜空间编辑更容易解释。
description.en: StyleGAN redesigned the GAN generator around a learned style space that modulates synthesis layers. The architecture produced high-quality faces and made latent-space editing more interpretable.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
